title: I Searched for UFOs on Skinwalker Ranch…
summary: Jesse Michels visits Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to investigate paranormal and UFO activity, speaking with ranch owner Brandon Fugal and his team about electromagnetic anomalies, cattle mutilations, UFO sightings, and mysterious metallic objects buried beneath the property. The interview explores the ranch's history from Native American curses to Robert Bigelow's government-funded research, and documents various unexplained phenomena affecting both equipment and human health.

acronyms.definition: The official government UFO program led by Lou Elizondo that studied Skinwalker Ranch between 2007 and 2012
Federal law that allows public access to government records, but does not apply to private company data like that held by Bigelow Aerospace
Modern terminology for UFOs used in government and scientific contexts
Relating to electromagnetic fields and radiation

events.description: Skinwalker Ranch became the center of study for ATIP, the official government UFO program
End of ATIP's study period at Skinwalker Ranch
On October 14, a group of 11 people including a security detail member named George experienced severe health effects on the property, with George becoming immobilized and hospitalized

key_claims.claim: A large metallic object approximately 400 feet wide is buried beneath the mesa at Skinwalker Ranch
Metal samples from drilling contained europium and tellurium, indicating they were manufactured rather than naturally occurring
People with more neuronally dense areas between the caudate nucleus and putamen may be more predisposed to paranormal experiences
All data from ATIP's study of Skinwalker Ranch is both classified and not subject to FOIA because it was run under Bigelow Aerospace
Aerospace corporations have knowledge in the UAP area that is specifically sequestered against FOIA due to proprietary labels
UFO and remote viewing programs have not ceased but have been shifted into the private sector and special access programs
Scientists who studied at Skinwalker Ranch experienced hitchhiker effects where the phenomenon followed them home
